heading: Cooperation with Secretary of the Interior
label: 778b Cooperation with Secretary of the Interior
text: The Secretary of the Interior is authorized to cooperate in carrying out the provisions of this chapter by furnishing such information and assistance as may be requested by the Secretary of Agriculture.
notes: Amendments1996— substituted “the Secretary of the Interior” for “The Department of Agriculture” and “requested by the Secretary of Agriculture” for “requested by the Secretary of the Interior”.Pub. L. 104–127
amendments: Amendments1996— substituted “the Secretary of the Interior” for “The Department of Agriculture” and “requested by the Secretary of Agriculture” for “requested by the Secretary of the Interior”.Pub. L. 104–127
